summary: Risques & Durabilite Module (ARS 1000 Clauses 6.1, 6.2) - Complete Testing. All 27 backend API tests PASSED. All frontend UI elements verified working including dashboard with KPIs, matrice par categorie, registre des risques, create/mitigation modals. ModulesARSGrid on cooperative dashboard shows 7 module cards with KPIs and readiness bar.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend risques_durabilite.py correctly implements 6 risk categories: ENVIRONNEMENT, SOCIAL, ECONOMIQUE, CLIMATIQUE, GOUVERNANCE, TRACABILITE
Score calculation correctly implemented: probabilite_idx * impact_idx (1-5 each)
Niveau logic correctly implemented: Critique (>=16), Eleve (>=9), Moyen (>=4), Faible (<4)
Mitigation action correctly changes risk status to 'en_mitigation'
ARS1000 Consolide dashboard correctly includes risques module as 7th module with score calculation
Frontend RisquesDashboard.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
ModulesARSGrid.jsx correctly displays 7 module cards with KPIs fetched from respective APIs
QuickActionsPanel has 'Risques' link in ARS 1000 section
All module cards are clickable and navigate to respective module pages
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed risks during testing (TEST_Playwright_Risque, TEST_Score_*, TEST_Mitigation_*, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Risques & Durabilite module fully tested. 6 risk categories, score calculation (prob*impact), 4 niveaux (Critique/Eleve/Moyen/Faible). ModulesARSGrid shows 7 modules on dashboard. All module cards clickable. QuickActionsPanel has Risques link.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/risques/reference/categories: PASSED - Returns 6 categories with code, label, exemples
backend_endpoints.GET /api/risques/reference/niveaux: PASSED - Returns 5 probabilite and 5 impact levels
backend_endpoints.POST /api/risques/registre: PASSED - Creates risk with auto-calculated score and niveau
backend_endpoints.GET /api/risques/registre: PASSED - Returns risks with stats (total, critiques, eleves, moyens, faibles, ouverts, mitigees)
backend_endpoints.PUT /api/risques/registre/{id}: PASSED - Updates risk and recalculates score
backend_endpoints.POST /api/risques/registre/{id}/mitigati: PASSED - Adds mitigation action, changes status to en_mitigation
backend_endpoints.GET /api/risques/dashboard: PASSED - Returns KPIs, par_categorie, categories_reference, top_risques
backend_endpoints.GET /api/ars1000-consolide/dashboard: PASSED - Includes risques module in 7 modules with score

frontend_pages./cooperative/dashboard: PASSED - ModulesARSGrid with 7 module cards, readiness bar, QuickActionsPanel
frontend_pages./cooperative/risques: PASSED - Dashboard with KPIs, matrice par categorie, registre des risques

frontend_interactions.ModulesARSGrid: PASSED - 7 module cards displayed with KPIs
frontend_interactions.Readiness bar: PASSED - Shows global ARS 1000 readiness score
frontend_interactions.Module cards navigation: PASSED - All cards clickable, navigate to respective modules
frontend_interactions.QuickActionsPanel Risques link: PASSED - Link present in ARS 1000 section
frontend_interactions.Create risque modal: PASSED - Opens, fills form, submits successfully
frontend_interactions.Mitigation modal: PASSED - Opens, fills form, submits successfully
